description_long: This object is a classic adjustable dumbbell featuring a central metallic handle with a cylindrical, knurled grip for secure handling. On each end, there are round, black weight plates secured by star-shaped threaded collars, which are metallic and have a shiny finish. The handle is straight and appears to be made of steel, while the weight plates are likely cast iron with a matte black coating. The collars are designed for easy tightening and removal, allowing for quick weight adjustments. The overall construction is robust, with no visible signs of damage or excessive wear. This type of dumbbell is commonly found in gyms, home workout spaces, or urban parks with fitness equipment.
description: A robust adjustable dumbbell with a steel knurled handle, black round weight plates, and metallic star-shaped collars. The design is classic and durable, suitable for urban fitness environments.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the star-shaped metallic collar and the circular profile of the weight plates.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the dumbbell, the straight knurled handle, and both sets of weight plates and collars.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, with the star-shaped collar and round weight plates visible.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the handle, weight plates, and collars from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, round cross-section, metallic, knurled texture for grip, no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_end_cap_design: Star-shaped metallic threaded collars, round flat end plates, metallic with a shiny finish, no visible patterns except threading.
attribute_condition: Appears in good condition with no visible rust, scratches, or damage; surfaces look clean and well-maintained.
